overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with pink hair walking through a dense futuristic city district. The character navigates neon-lit pedestrian plazas, crosses wide streets, and passes various vendors and crowds in a vibrant cyberpunk urban environment with elevated transit tracks and towering digital billboards.

agents.ego_description: walking along covered sidewalk toward a wide crosswalk with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with pink hair walking ahead of ego

entered.detail: orange and gray covered walkway structure with pillars
large vertical digital screen displaying PASSION advertisement on building facade
multi-level parking garage with orange and teal structural elements
wide pedestrian crosswalk with bold yellow stripes
steam rising from vents near the street corner

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk next to a multi-level parking structure, approaching a wide yellow crosswalk. A large digital billboard displaying 'PASSION' dominates the view ahead, while steam rises from street vents on the right.

events.description: steps from covered sidewalk onto the open crosswalk
crossing the wide street alongside other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street intersection toward the pedestrian plaza

notable_agents.action: futuristic purple car driving along the street parallel to crosswalk

entered.detail: elevated curved monorail track structure spanning across the street
bright green automated vending machine with burrito advertisements
tall palm trees lining the plaza entrance

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide yellow-striped crosswalk into a sunlit plaza area. An elevated transit track curves overhead while a green vending machine and palm trees mark the plaza entrance. A futuristic vehicle passes on the right as the crowd density increases.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza with vending machines and digital signage

events.description: entering denser crowd area near the burrito vending machine

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowded pedestrian plaza past various NPCs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue outfit and beanie walking toward camera

entered.detail: small digital advertising screens mounted on poles

segments.scene_description: Walking through the bustling pedestrian plaza with tiled ground, the character passes the green burrito vending machine on the left. The area is dense with pedestrians moving in various directions beneath the curved overhead transit track and digital signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor stall with outdoor seating

events.description: approaching food stall with yellow canopy and green seating

agents.ego_description: walking past the food vendor stall observing the vendor and seating area

notable_agents.action: vendor preparing food behind the counter wearing white uniform
customer sitting at green table eating

entered.detail: yellow fabric canopy over food preparation area
bright green plastic stools and tables for outdoor dining
metal counter with cooking equipment and food displays

segments.scene_description: The character passes a food stall with a yellow canopy and bright green plastic chairs. A vendor works behind the counter while a customer sits eating. The environment is more sheltered here with less sky visibility.

events.description: leaving food stall area to cross street under overpass
crossing the street at the Ellison intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the final street under the overpass structure

entered.detail: blue street sign with white text reading 'Ellison'
massive orange industrial pipes running vertically along building
heavy concrete bridge supports and beams overhead
yellow pedestrian crossing lines under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the food stall area and crosses another street under a massive concrete overpass. Large orange industrial pipes run up the left side of the street, and a blue 'Ellison' street sign is visible as the character walks across the yellow crosswalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense futuristic district, transitioning from a neon-lit street corner into a bustling pedestrian plaza and finally beneath a heavy industrial overpass. It begins along a covered sidewalk beside a multi-level parking structure, moving toward a wide yellow crosswalk dominated by a massive digital billboard and rising steam. As the character crosses the street, the scene opens into a sunlit plaza characterized by palm trees, a green vending machine, and a curved elevated transit track overhead. The camera then weaves through a dense crowd of pedestrians and passes a sheltered food stall with a yellow canopy and bright green chairs. Finally, the environment shifts back to a gritty urban scale as the character crosses another yellow street marking under a massive concrete overpass flanked by large orange industrial pipes and a blue street sign.
